chosen_action.title: Wire an explicit post-hold re-entry contract into the live measurement-hold release job

why_this_action.summary: The execution board still has no truthful do-now packet in the active review window. The already-scheduled 2026-05-25T02:05:05 post-hold run was still carrying a generic prompt, which risked another fake-progress re-entry. The highest-leverage same-run move was to create a concrete re-entry contract and patch the live scheduled job to consume it.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
distribution_lane_latest.json: short review-window congestion clears at 2026-05-25T02:05:05
primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json: remaining untouched publisher target is ctxt.dev / Signum via manual-only public paths
reddit_post_analysis_latest.md: Reddit remains repetition-risky and blocked/degraded
competitor_analysis_2026-05-24.md: positioning should stay on unattended coding / verification / reviewable finish states

result.summary: Added a post-hold distribution re-entry contract artifact, taught future hold scheduling to inject it into the release prompt, updated the already-scheduled measurement-hold release cron job to read it, and verified the measurement-hold test suite with unittest.
